title: card-skill poster mode input
description: Structured input for poster mode CLI rendering. Poster mode produces a series of cards (1080x1440 each) from structured content.

design.description: Design system name. Defaults to 'stripe'. See scripts/lib/designs.js for full list.

title.description: Overall title for the poster series, shown on the first card header.

subtitle.description: Optional subtitle shown below the title on the first card.

source.description: Optional source attribution shown in the colophon on the final card.

cards.description: Array of card objects. Each card gets its own HTML file and PNG output.

body.description: Array of body elements for this card.

logo.description: Optional path to a brand logo image. Omit for an unbranded output.

brand_name.description: Optional brand name in the colophon footer. Omit for an unbranded output.

examples.title: 从零到一：创业第一年的 10 条教训

body.text: 不要等产品完美才上线
MVP 的 M 不是 Minimum，是 Mother——够用就行。
付费是最好的产品验证。
